C is incorrect: 1972 is when the Department of Space was created.

D is incorrect: 1974 is unrelated to ISRO's formation.

💡 Vikram Sarabhai is regarded as the father of the Indian space programme.
Q.No 21 Science & TechnologyEnglish
ध्वनि का अनुभव हमारे मस्तिष्क में लगभग कितने समय तक बना रहता है?
A
0.01 s
B
0.1 s
✓ Correct
C
1 s
D
10 s

Solution

Correct answer: B. The sensation of sound persists in our brain (ears) for about 0.1 second; this is why an echo is heard distinctly only if the reflected sound returns after at least 0.1 s.

A is incorrect: 0.01 s is too short for the persistence of hearing.

C is incorrect: 1 s is far longer than the actual persistence.

D is incorrect: 10 s is much too long.

💡 This persistence of hearing determines the minimum distance needed for a distinct echo.
Q.No 23 Science & TechnologyHindi
पादप के संवहनी तंत्र के कौन से घटक, जल चालन के लिए उत्तरदायी होते हैं?
A
चालनी नलिका और सहकोशिका
B
वाहिका और ट्रेकीड
✓ Correct
C
द्वार-कोशिका और रंध्र
D
फ्लोएम फाइबर

Solution

Correct answer: B. In a plant's vascular system, the vessels and tracheids (xylem elements) are responsible for conducting water.

A is incorrect: Sieve tubes and companion cells (phloem) conduct food, not water.

C is incorrect: Guard cells and stomata regulate gas exchange.

D is incorrect: Phloem fibres provide support, not water conduction.

💡 Xylem carries water and minerals upward; phloem transports food made in the leaves.
Q.No 24 Science & TechnologyHindi
पादप और जंतुओं के मृत अवशेषों को विघटित करने के लिए मुख्यतः: कौन से जीव उत्तरदायी होते हैं?
A
शाकाहारी
B
उत्पादक
C
अपघटक
✓ Correct
D
मांसाहारी

Solution

Correct answer: C. Decomposers (such as bacteria and fungi) are mainly responsible for breaking down the dead remains of plants and animals.

A is incorrect: Herbivores eat plants; they are consumers, not decomposers.

B is incorrect: Producers (green plants) make food, they do not decompose remains.

D is incorrect: Carnivores eat other animals; they are consumers.

💡 Decomposers recycle nutrients back into the soil, completing the nutrient cycle.
Q.No 27 Science & TechnologyHindi⚠ low OCR confidence
पत्तियों का हरा रंग किसके कारण होता है?
A
द्वार कोशिकाएँ (6८०७0 ८€॥5)
B
GIScs (xylem)
C
फ्लोएम (006)
D
uvteftd (Chlorophyll)
✓ Correct

Solution

Correct answer: D. The green colour of leaves is due to the pigment chlorophyll, which captures light for photosynthesis.

A is incorrect: Guard cells control stomatal opening, not colour.

B is incorrect: Xylem conducts water.

C is incorrect: Phloem transports food.

💡 Chlorophyll absorbs red and blue light and reflects green, giving leaves their colour.
Q.No 28 Science & TechnologyHindi⚠ low OCR confidence
पादप के किस भाग को "खाद्य कारखाना (५४00 ५८0४)" कहा जाता है?
A
फूल
B
तना
C
जड़
D
पत्ता
✓ Correct

Solution

Correct answer: D. The leaf is called the 'food factory' of a plant because photosynthesis takes place there.

A is incorrect: The flower is the reproductive part.

B is incorrect: The stem supports the plant and transports materials.

C is incorrect: The root absorbs water and anchors the plant.

💡 Leaves contain chloroplasts where light energy is converted into chemical energy (glucose).
Q.No 29 Science & TechnologyHindi
मस्तिष्क और मेरुरज्जु मुख्य रूप से से बने होते हैं।
A
पेशी ऊतक
B
संयोजी ऊतक
C
तंत्रिका ऊतक
✓ Correct
D
उपकला ऊतक

Solution

Correct answer: C. The brain and spinal cord are made mainly of nervous tissue, which transmits electrical impulses.

A is incorrect: Muscle tissue is contractile.

B is incorrect: Connective tissue binds and supports.

D is incorrect: Epithelial tissue forms linings.

💡 The brain and spinal cord together form the central nervous system (CNS).
Q.No 32 Science & TechnologyHindi
पुरुषों में निम्नलिखित में से कौन-सी अंतःस्रावी ग्रंथि यौवनारंभ से संबंधित हार्मोन का स्त्राव करती हैं?
A
पीनियल ग्रंथि
B
वृषण
✓ Correct
C
अग्न्याशय
D
थाइमस ग्रंथि

Solution

Correct answer: B. In males, the testes are the endocrine glands that secrete the hormone (testosterone) associated with the onset of puberty.

A is incorrect: The pineal gland secretes melatonin.

C is incorrect: The pancreas secretes insulin.

D is incorrect: The thymus is involved in immunity.

💡 Testosterone drives male secondary sexual characteristics during puberty.
Q.No 34 Science & TechnologyHindi
भारतीय अंतरिक्ष विज्ञान एवं प्रौद्योगिकी संस्थान में स्थित है।
A
कोचि
B
नागपुर
C
नई दिल्ली
D
तिरुवनंतपुरम
✓ Correct

Solution

Correct answer: D. The Indian Institute of Space Science and Technology (IIST) is located in Thiruvananthapuram, Kerala.

A is incorrect: It is not in Kochi.

B is incorrect: It is not in Nagpur.

C is incorrect: It is not in New Delhi.

💡 IIST is Asia's first space university, set up under the Department of Space.
Q.No 33 Science & TechnologyEnglish⚠ low OCR confidence
बर्फ का गलनांक ।( होता हैं।
A
373.15 K
B
0 K
C
273.15 K
✓ Correct
D
100 K

Solution

Correct answer: C. The melting point of ice is 273.15 Kelvin (0 degrees Celsius).

A is incorrect: 373.15 K is the boiling point of water.

B is incorrect: 0 K is absolute zero.

D is incorrect: 100 K is far below the melting point.

💡 To convert Celsius to Kelvin, add 273.15.
Q.No 24 Science & TechnologyHindi
897 में कैथोड किरण प्रयोगों के माध्यम से इलेक्ट्रॉन की खोज किसने की थी?
A
अर्नेस्ट रदरफोर्ड
B
जे.जे. थॉमसन
✓ Correct
C
नील्स बोहर
D
जेम्स चैडविक

Solution

Correct answer: B. J.J. Thomson discovered the electron in 1897 through his cathode-ray-tube experiments.

A is incorrect: Ernest Rutherford discovered the nucleus and proton.

C is incorrect: Niels Bohr gave the model of the atom.

D is incorrect: James Chadwick discovered the neutron.

💡 Thomson's discovery showed that atoms contain smaller, negatively charged particles.
Q.No 34 Science & TechnologyEnglish⚠ low OCR confidence
गगनयान मिशन मानव अंतरिक्ष उड़ान क्षमता का एक दिवसीय मिशन है, जिसमें चालक दल को कक्षा में प्रक्षेपित करके उन्हें सुरक्षित रूप से पृथ्वी पर वापस लाया जाएगा।
A
3
✓ Correct
B
5
C
7
D
9

Solution

Correct answer: A. The Gaganyaan mission is planned as a 3-day human spaceflight, launching a crew into orbit and bringing them safely back.

B is incorrect: 5 days is not the planned duration.

C is incorrect: 7 days is incorrect.

D is incorrect: 9 days is incorrect.

💡 Gaganyaan will be India's first crewed orbital spaceflight mission.
Q.No 35 Science & TechnologyHindi
कॉम्बैट एयर टीमिंग सिस्टम (सी.ए.टी.एस.) वॉरियर, एक उन्नत मानव रहित हवाई यान अवधारणा, मई 2025 में किस संगठन द्वारा विकसित की गई है?
A
एच.ए.एल.
✓ Correct
B
डी.आर.डी.ओ.
C
इसरो
D
बी.ए.आर.सी.

Solution

Correct answer: A. The Combat Air Teaming System (CATS) Warrior, an unmanned aerial vehicle concept, has been developed by Hindustan Aeronautics Limited (HAL).

B is incorrect: DRDO develops various systems but CATS Warrior is led by HAL.

C is incorrect: ISRO is the space agency, not the developer.

D is incorrect: BARC works on atomic research.

💡 The CATS Warrior is a 'loyal wingman' drone designed to operate alongside fighter jets.
Q.No 31 Science & TechnologyEnglish⚠ low OCR confidence
गुरुत्वाकर्षण के सार्वभौमिक नियम के अनुसार, आनुपातिकता के स्थिरांक को द्शनि के लिए क्या प्रयोग किया जाता हैं?
A
U
B
K
C
G
✓ Correct
D
p

Solution

Correct answer: C. In Newton's law of universal gravitation, the constant of proportionality is the gravitational constant, denoted by 'G'.

A is incorrect: 'U' is not the gravitational constant.

B is incorrect: 'K' is used for other constants (e.g. Coulomb's).

D is incorrect: 'p' usually denotes pressure or momentum.

💡 G is approximately 6.674 x 10^-11 N m^2/kg^2.
Q.No 21 Science & TechnologyHindi
मानव वृक्क द्वारा उत्सर्जित प्रमुख नाइट्रोजनयुक्त अपशिष्ट उत्पाद हैं।
A
कार्बन डाइऑक्साइड और ऑक्सीजन
B
यूरिया और यूरिक अम्ल
✓ Correct
C
अमीनो अम्ल और ग्लूकोज
D
वसीय अम्ल और ग्लिसरॉल

Solution

Correct answer: B. The main nitrogenous waste products excreted by the human kidney are urea and uric acid.

A is incorrect: Carbon dioxide and oxygen are exchanged by the lungs, not excreted by the kidney as nitrogenous waste.

C is incorrect: Amino acids and glucose are reabsorbed, not excreted normally.

D is incorrect: Fatty acids and glycerol are products of fat digestion, not kidney waste.

💡 Urea is the major nitrogenous waste in humans, formed in the liver from ammonia.
Q.No 25 Science & TechnologyHindi
कार्य के आधार पर, निम्नलिखित में से कौन-सा, प्राणि-ऊतक का एक प्रकार नहीं है?
A
उपकला ऊतक
B
संयोजी ऊतक
C
पेशीय ऊतक
D
संवहनी ऊतक
✓ Correct

Solution

Correct answer: D. Based on function, 'vascular tissue' is NOT a type of animal tissue - vascular tissue (xylem/phloem) is found in plants.

A is incorrect: Epithelial tissue is an animal tissue.

B is incorrect: Connective tissue is an animal tissue.

C is incorrect: Muscular tissue is an animal tissue.

💡 The four basic animal tissues are epithelial, connective, muscular and nervous.
Q.No 26 Science & TechnologyHindi
जल और थल पर रहने वाले जंतुओं को क्या कहा जाता है?
A
स्तनधारी
B
स्थलीय
C
जलीय
D
उभयचर
✓ Correct

Solution

Correct answer: D. Animals that live both in water and on land are called amphibians.

A is incorrect: Mammals are a class of warm-blooded vertebrates, not defined by living in water and land.

B is incorrect: 'Terrestrial' means living on land only.

C is incorrect: 'Aquatic' means living in water only.

💡 Frogs and toads are common examples of amphibians.
Q.No 27 Science & TechnologyHindi
अपघटकों के संबंध में निम्नलिखित में से कौन-सा कथन सत्य है?
A
वे स्वपोषी होते हैं
B
वे पोषक तत्वों को पुनः मृदा में पुनर्चक्रित करते हैं
✓ Correct
C
वे पादपों के लिए भोजन उत्पन्न करते हैं
D
वे जीवित प्राणियों को खाते हैं

Solution

Correct answer: B. Decomposers recycle nutrients back into the soil by breaking down dead organic matter.

A is incorrect: They are not autotrophs (they cannot make their own food).

C is incorrect: They do not produce food for plants directly.

D is incorrect: They feed on dead matter, not living beings.

💡 Bacteria and fungi are the chief decomposers in an ecosystem.
Q.No 30 Science & TechnologyHindi
मनुष्यों के क्षुद्वांत्र में दीर्घरोम का प्राथमिक कार्य कया है?
A
पाचन एंजाइमों का स्राव करना
B
अवशोषण के लिए सतही क्षेत्रफल बढ़ाना
✓ Correct
C
आमाशयी अम्ल को निष्प्रभावित करना
D
भोजन के कणों को तोड़ना

Solution

Correct answer: B. The primary function of the villi in the human small intestine is to increase the surface area for the absorption of digested food.

A is incorrect: Secreting digestive enzymes is done by glands, not the villi specifically.

C is incorrect: Neutralising stomach acid is done by bile/pancreatic juice.

D is incorrect: Breaking down food particles is the role of enzymes, not the villi's main function.

💡 Millions of tiny finger-like villi greatly increase the intestine's absorptive surface.
Q.No 32 Science & TechnologyEnglish
भारत के पहले उपग्रह प्रक्षेपण के लिए उपयोग किया गया एस.एल.वी.-3 रॉकेट चरण का रॉकेट था।
A
2
B
3
C
4
✓ Correct
D
5

Solution

Correct answer: C. The SLV-3 rocket, used for India's first satellite launch (Rohini), was a 4-stage rocket.

A is incorrect: It was not a 2-stage rocket.

B is incorrect: It was not a 3-stage rocket.

D is incorrect: It was not a 5-stage rocket.

💡 The SLV-3 made India the sixth nation to achieve orbital launch capability (1980).
Q.No 31 Science & TechnologyHindi
पदार्थ का तापमान बढ़ने पर कणों की गतिज ऊर्जा का क्या होता हैं?
A
कमी
B
वृद्धि
✓ Correct
C
स्थिर रहता है
D
यह स्थितिज ऊर्जा में परिवर्तित हो जाता है

Solution

Correct answer: B. When the temperature of a substance rises, the kinetic energy of its particles increases (they move faster).

A is incorrect: It does not decrease with rising temperature.

C is incorrect: It does not stay constant when temperature rises.

D is incorrect: It is not converted into potential energy by heating.

💡 Temperature is a measure of the average kinetic energy of the particles of a substance.
Q.No 33 Science & TechnologyHindi⚠ low OCR confidence
न्यू स्पेस इंडिया लिमिटेड के संबंध में निम्नलिखित में से कौन सा कथन सही है? [. यह एक निजी क्षेत्र का उद्यम है। [. यह विभिन्न प्रकार और श्रेणियों के उपग्रहों के निर्माण तथा इन-ऑर्बिट डिलीवरी के कार्य में शामिल है।
A
Only I
B
Only II
✓ Correct
C
Both I and II
D
Neither I nor II

Solution

Correct answer: B. For NewSpace India Limited (NSIL), only statement II is correct - it handles the manufacture and in-orbit delivery of satellites; it is a public-sector (not private) enterprise, so statement I is wrong.

A is incorrect: 'Only I' is wrong; NSIL is a public-sector undertaking, not private.

C is incorrect: 'Both' is wrong because statement I is incorrect.

D is incorrect: 'Neither' is wrong because statement II is correct.

💡 NSIL is the commercial arm of ISRO, a Central Public Sector Enterprise.
Q.No 34 Science & TechnologyHindi
दिसंबर 2024 में, किस संस्थान ने मोबाइल समाधान के साथ कम लागत वाली 'टिनिटस डिवाइस' विकसित की?
A
आई.आई.एस.सी. बेंगलुरु
B
आई.आई.टी. कानपुर
C
जे.आई.पी.एम.ई.आर. पुडुचेरी
D
आई.आई.टी. बॉम्बे
✓ Correct

Solution

Correct answer: D. In December 2024, IIT Bombay developed a low-cost 'tinnitus device' with a mobile-based solution.

A is incorrect: IISc Bengaluru was not credited with this device.

B is incorrect: IIT Kanpur was not the developer cited.

C is incorrect: JIPMER Puducherry was not the developer.

💡 Tinnitus is the perception of ringing or buzzing in the ears.
Q.No 31 Science & TechnologyHindi
वायुमंडलीय दाब पर द्रव से गैस में अवस्था परिवर्तन को क्या कहते हैं?
A
पिंडीकरण
B
निक्षेप
C
हिमीकरण
D
वाष्पीकरण
✓ Correct

Solution

Correct answer: D. The change of state from liquid to gas at atmospheric pressure is called vaporisation (evaporation/boiling).

A is incorrect: 'Condensation' is gas to liquid.

B is incorrect: 'Deposition' is gas directly to solid.

C is incorrect: 'Freezing' is liquid to solid.

💡 Vaporisation occurs either as slow evaporation or rapid boiling at the boiling point.
Q.No 30 Science & TechnologyHindi⚠ low OCR confidence
निम्नलिखित में से कौन सा सूर्य के अवलोकन के लिए समर्पित पहला भारतीय मिशन हैं?
A
Hinode
B
Parker Solar Probe
C
Aditya-L1
✓ Correct
D
SOHO

Solution

Correct answer: C. Aditya-L1 is India's first mission dedicated to observing the Sun.

A is incorrect: Hinode is a Japanese solar mission.

B is incorrect: The Parker Solar Probe is a NASA mission.

D is incorrect: SOHO is a joint ESA-NASA solar observatory.

💡 Aditya-L1 observes the Sun from the L1 Lagrange point, about 1.5 million km from Earth.
Q.No 29 Science & TechnologyHindi
भारत के पहले पशु स्टेम सेल (मूल कोशिका) बायोबैंक का उद्घाटन में किया गया।
A
राष्ट्रीय पशु जैव प्रौद्योगिकी संस्थान
✓ Correct
B
आई.आई.टी. मद्रास
C
भारतीय विष विज्ञान अनुसंधान संस्थान
D
भारतीय विज्ञान संस्थान

Solution

Correct answer: A. India's first animal stem-cell biobank was inaugurated at the National Institute of Animal Biotechnology (NIAB).

B is incorrect: IIT Madras did not host this biobank.

C is incorrect: The Indian Institute of Toxicology Research is not the location.

D is incorrect: The Indian Institute of Science is not the location.

💡 Animal stem-cell biobanks help conserve livestock genetic resources.
Q.No 31 Science & TechnologyEnglish
मनुष्य के लिए ध्वनि की श्रव्य सीमा क्या हैं?
A
2 Hz to 2000 kHz
B
20 Hz to 200 kHz
C
20 Hz to 20000 Hz
✓ Correct
D
20 Hz to 2000 Hz

Solution

Correct answer: C. The audible range of sound for humans is about 20 Hz to 20,000 Hz (20 kHz).

A is incorrect: This range is incorrect.

B is incorrect: This upper limit (200 kHz) is far too high.

D is incorrect: 20-2000 Hz covers only part of the range.

💡 Sounds above 20,000 Hz are ultrasonic; below 20 Hz are infrasonic.
Q.No 21 Science & TechnologyHindi
"सूक्ष्मजीव विज्ञान के जनक" के रूप में किसे जाना जाता है?
A
एंटोनी वैन लीउवेनहॉक
✓ Correct
B
लुई पाश्चर
C
रॉबर्ट हुक
D
एडवर्ड जेनर

Solution

Correct answer: A. Antonie van Leeuwenhoek is known as the 'Father of Microbiology' for being the first to observe microorganisms using his microscopes.

B is incorrect: Louis Pasteur is the father of modern microbiology/germ theory, but the 'father of microbiology' title here is van Leeuwenhoek.

C is incorrect: Robert Hooke coined the term 'cell'.

D is incorrect: Edward Jenner pioneered vaccination.

💡 Van Leeuwenhoek called the tiny organisms he saw 'animalcules'.
Q.No 24 Science & TechnologyHindi
मस्तिष्क का कौन-सा भाग, मुख्यतः चिंतन (0४0४/000) के लिए उत्तरदायी होता है?
A
मध्यमस्तिष्क
B
अग्रमस्तिष्क
✓ Correct
C
पश्चमस्तिष्क
D
मेरुरज्जु

Solution

Correct answer: B. The forebrain (cerebrum) is mainly responsible for thinking, reasoning and intelligence.

A is incorrect: The midbrain relays sensory signals.

C is incorrect: The hindbrain controls balance and vital functions.

D is incorrect: The spinal cord conducts impulses and reflexes.

💡 The cerebrum is the largest part of the human brain and the seat of higher thought.
Q.No 27 Science & TechnologyHindi⚠ low OCR confidence
मानव में उत्सर्जन के संबंध में, निम्नलिखित में से कौन-सा कथन सही है? [. वृक्क उदर में रीढ़ की हड्डी के दोनों ओर स्थित होते है [[. वृक्क में उत्पादित मूत्र मूत्रवाहिनी से होकर मूत्राशय में जाता है।
A
Only I
B
Only II
C
Both I and II
✓ Correct
D
Neither I nor II

Solution

Correct answer: C. Both statements are correct - the kidneys lie on either side of the backbone in the abdomen (I), and urine produced in the kidneys passes through the ureters to the bladder (II).

A is incorrect: 'Only I' is incomplete.

B is incorrect: 'Only II' is incomplete.

D is incorrect: 'Neither' is wrong since both are correct.

💡 The human excretory system includes two kidneys, two ureters, a bladder and a urethra.
Q.No 29 Science & TechnologyHindi
निम्नलिखित में से कौन सा ग्रह हमारे सौरमंडल में आकार में पांचवां सबसे बड़ा ग्रह है?
A
बुध
B
शुक्र
C
पृथ्वी
✓ Correct
D
यूरेनस

Solution

Correct answer: C. Earth is the fifth largest planet in our solar system (after Jupiter, Saturn, Uranus and Neptune).

A is incorrect: Mercury is the smallest planet.

B is incorrect: Venus is slightly smaller than Earth.

D is incorrect: Uranus is larger than Earth (third or fourth largest).

💡 By size the order is Jupiter > Saturn > Uranus > Neptune > Earth.
Q.No 36 Science & TechnologyHindi⚠ low OCR confidence
कुक्कुट पालन के संबंध में निम्नलिखित में से कौन-सा कथन सही है? [. कुक्ुट पालन घरेलू मुर्गियों को पालने के लिए किया जाता है। [. कुक्कट उत्पादन में अंडा उत्पादन और कुक्कुट मांस के लिए ब्रॉयलर उत्पादन शामिल है।
A
Only I
B
Only II
C
Both I and II
✓ Correct
D
Neither I nor II

Solution

Correct answer: C. Both statements about poultry farming are correct - it involves rearing domestic fowl (I), and poultry production covers both egg production and broiler (meat) production (II).

A is incorrect: 'Only I' is incomplete.

B is incorrect: 'Only II' is incomplete.

D is incorrect: 'Neither' is wrong since both are correct.

💡 Layer birds are reared for eggs, while broilers are reared for meat.
Q.No 37 Science & TechnologyHindi
पादप कोशिका भित्ति का प्राथमिक कार्य क्या है ?
A
पादपों को संरचनात्मक दृढ़ता प्रदान करता है
✓ Correct
B
कोशिका विभाजन में सहायक होता है
C
भोजन का संश्लेषण
D
पादपों में प्रकाश संश्नेषण करता है

Solution

Correct answer: A. The primary function of the plant cell wall is to provide structural strength and rigidity to the plant.

B is incorrect: It does not directly aid cell division.

C is incorrect: It does not synthesise food.

D is incorrect: Photosynthesis is done by chloroplasts, not the cell wall.

💡 The plant cell wall is made mainly of cellulose.
Q.No 30 Science & TechnologyHindi⚠ low OCR confidence
980 के दशक में भारतीय उपग्रह प्रक्षेपण में प्रयुक्त स्वदेशी प्रक्षेपण यान था।
A
एस.एल.वी.-3
✓ Correct
B
पी.एस.एल.वी.
C
ए.एस.एल.वी.
D
जी.एस.एल.वी.

Solution

Correct answer: A. In the 1980s, India's indigenous launch vehicle used for satellite launches was the SLV-3.

B is incorrect: The PSLV came in the 1990s.

C is incorrect: The ASLV came in the late 1980s as an experimental vehicle, but the first indigenous launcher was the SLV-3.

D is incorrect: The GSLV came much later.

💡 The SLV-3 placed the Rohini satellite in orbit in 1980, with A.P.J. Abdul Kalam as project director.
Q.No 31 Science & TechnologyHindi
फरवरी 2025 में किस संस्थान के शोधकर्ताओं ने जल-विकर्षक, चालकीय टेक्सटाइल विकसित किया?
A
आई.आई.टी. दिल्ली
B
आई.आई.टी. मद्रास
C
आई.आई.टी. खड़गपुर
D
आई.आई.टी. गुवाहाटी
✓ Correct

Solution

Correct answer: D. In February 2025, researchers at IIT Guwahati developed a water-repellent, conductive textile.

A is incorrect: IIT Delhi was not credited here.

B is incorrect: IIT Madras was not the developer cited.

C is incorrect: IIT Kharagpur was not the developer.

💡 Conductive, water-repellent fabrics are useful for wearable electronics and protective clothing.
Q.No 24 Science & TechnologyHindi
निम्नलिखित में से कौन-सा, मानव के अंतःस्रावी तंत्र का भाग नहीं है?
A
Heart
✓ Correct
B
Hypothalamus
C
Pancreas
D
Ovary

Solution

Correct answer: A. The heart is NOT part of the human endocrine system (it is part of the circulatory system).

B is incorrect: The hypothalamus is an endocrine structure controlling the pituitary.

C is incorrect: The pancreas is an endocrine (and exocrine) gland.

D is incorrect: The ovary is an endocrine gland producing female hormones.

💡 The endocrine system consists of glands that secrete hormones directly into the blood.
Q.No 25 Science & TechnologyHindi
निम्नलिखित में से कौन-सा मानव की अनैच्छिक क्रिया का उदाहरण है?
A
Writing
B
Moving a chair
C
Talking
D
Heartbeat
✓ Correct

Solution

Correct answer: D. The heartbeat is an example of an involuntary action - it happens automatically without conscious control.

A is incorrect: Writing is a voluntary action.

B is incorrect: Moving a chair is voluntary.

C is incorrect: Talking is a voluntary action.

💡 Involuntary actions are controlled mainly by the autonomic nervous system and the medulla.
Q.No 26 Science & TechnologyHindi
फरवरी 2025 में सिमिलिपाल टाइगर रिजर्व में स्थापित ट्रेलगार्ड ए.आई. क्या है?
A
ए.आई.-सक्षम कैमरों वाली प्रणाली।
✓ Correct
B
बाढ़ जैसी स्थिति के लिए एक पूर्व चेतावनी प्रणाली।
C
एक (0 सक्षम भुगतान एप्लिकेशन
D
मेगा अवसंरचना परियोजनाओं के लिए पर्यावरणीय स्वीकृति हेतु एक ए.आई. सक्षम एप्लिकेशन।

Solution

Correct answer: A. TrailGuard AI, set up at Similipal Tiger Reserve in February 2025, is a system of AI-enabled cameras for wildlife monitoring and anti-poaching alerts.

B is incorrect: It is not a flood early-warning system.

C is incorrect: It is not a payments app.

D is incorrect: It is not an environmental-clearance app.

💡 AI-enabled camera networks help detect poachers and protect wildlife in real time.
Q.No 27 Science & TechnologyHindi
निम्नलिखित में से कौन सा ग्रह गैसों और तरल पदार्थों से बना नहीं है?
A
शनि
B
यूरेनस
C
बृहस्पति
D
शुक्र
✓ Correct

Solution

Correct answer: D. Venus is a rocky (terrestrial) planet, NOT made of gases and liquids like the gas giants.

A is incorrect: Saturn is a gas giant.

B is incorrect: Uranus is an ice/gas giant.

C is incorrect: Jupiter is a gas giant.

💡 The four inner planets (Mercury, Venus, Earth, Mars) are rocky; the outer four are giant gas/ice planets.
Q.No 34 Science & TechnologyHindi⚠ low OCR confidence
ख में से किसके कारण मुर्गियों में कई प्रकार के रोग हो सकते हैं? [. विषाए ह. जीवाणु
A
Only I (Viruses)
B
Only II (Bacteria)
C
Both I and II
✓ Correct
D
Neither I nor II

Solution

Correct answer: C. Both viruses (I) and bacteria (II) can cause several diseases in poultry, so 'Both I and II' is correct.

A is incorrect: 'Only I' omits bacterial diseases.

B is incorrect: 'Only II' omits viral diseases.

D is incorrect: 'Neither' is wrong since both cause poultry diseases.

💡 Diseases like bird flu (viral) and fowl cholera (bacterial) affect poultry.
Q.No 35 Science & TechnologyHindi
मलय भाषा में के नाम का अर्थ "वनमानुष" है।
A
आरंगुटान
✓ Correct
B
सुमात्रा बाघ
C
कोमोडो ड्रैगन
D
इरावदी डॉल्फ़िन

Solution

Correct answer: A. In Malay, the name 'orangutan' means 'man of the forest' ('orang' = person, 'hutan' = forest).

B is incorrect: The Sumatran tiger's name does not mean this.

C is incorrect: The Komodo dragon's name does not mean 'man of the forest'.

D is incorrect: The Irrawaddy dolphin's name does not mean this.

💡 Orangutans are great apes found in the rainforests of Borneo and Sumatra.
Q.No 36 Science & TechnologyHindi
निम्नलिखित में से किस मक्खी को लिटिल मक्खी कहा जाता है?
A
Apis cerana indica
B
Apis dorsata
C
Apis florea
✓ Correct
D
Apis mellifera

Solution

Correct answer: C. Apis florea is known as the 'little bee' (little honeybee).

A is incorrect: Apis cerana indica is the Indian hive bee.

B is incorrect: Apis dorsata is the giant/rock bee.

D is incorrect: Apis mellifera is the European honeybee.

💡 Apis florea makes small, single-comb nests and produces little honey.
Q.No 37 Science & TechnologyHindi⚠ low OCR confidence
सजीवों में नाइट्रोजन निम्नलिखित में से किसका संघटक है? [. प्रोटीन [[. पर्णहरित
A
Only I (Protein)
B
Only II (Chlorophyll)
C
Both I and II
✓ Correct
D
Neither I nor II

Solution

Correct answer: C. Nitrogen is a component of both proteins (I) and chlorophyll (II) in living organisms, so 'Both I and II' is correct.

A is incorrect: 'Only I' omits chlorophyll.

B is incorrect: 'Only II' omits proteins.

D is incorrect: 'Neither' is wrong since nitrogen is in both.

💡 Nitrogen is also a key component of nucleic acids (DNA and RNA).
Q.No 25 Science & TechnologyHindi
निम्नलिखित में से कौन सी घटना गुरुत्वाकर्षण के सार्वभौमिक नियम द्वारा समझाई गई है?
A
सूर्य में नाभिकीय संलयन
B
चंद्रमा और सूर्य के कारण ज्वार-भाटा
✓ Correct
C
ध्रुवों के बीच चुंबकीय आकर्षण
D
नाभिक के चारों ओर इलेक्ट्रॉनों की गति

Solution

Correct answer: B. The rise and fall of ocean tides is explained by the universal law of gravitation - the gravitational pull of the Moon and the Sun on the oceans.

A is incorrect: Nuclear fusion in the Sun is a nuclear process, not gravitational.

C is incorrect: Magnetic attraction between poles is magnetism, not gravity.

D is incorrect: Electron motion around the nucleus is governed by electromagnetic forces.

💡 The Moon's gravity is the main cause of tides, with the Sun contributing too.
Q.No 26 Science & TechnologyHindi
किसी वस्तु का द्रव्यमान क्या मापता है?
A
इसका वजन
B
इसकी जड़ता
✓ Correct
C
इसका आयतन
D
इसका घनत्व

Solution

Correct answer: B. The mass of an object measures its inertia - its resistance to a change in its state of motion.

A is incorrect: Weight is the force of gravity on the object, not the same as mass.

C is incorrect: Volume is the space it occupies.

D is incorrect: Density is mass per unit volume.

💡 Mass is constant everywhere, while weight changes with gravity.
Q.No 28 Science & TechnologyHindi
किस देश ने चांद के दूसरे हिस्से पर पहला रोवर उतारा?
A
यू एस ए
B
चीन
✓ Correct
C
भारत
D
रूस

Solution

Correct answer: B. China was the first country to land a rover on the far side of the Moon (Chang'e-4, 2019).

A is incorrect: The USA has landed on the near side, not the first far-side rover.

C is incorrect: India's Chandrayaan-3 landed near the south pole (near side region), not the first far side.

D is incorrect: Russia did not achieve the first far-side rover landing.

💡 The far side of the Moon always faces away from Earth, requiring a relay satellite for communication.
Q.No 32 Science & TechnologyHindi
पर्यावरण अध्ययन हेतु सेटेलाइट रिमोट सेंसिंग के प्रबंधन के लिए निम्न में से कौन-सी भारतीय एजेंसी उत्तरदायी है?
A
एफएसआई - भारतीय वन सर्वेक्षण
B
सीपीसीबी - केंद्रीय प्रदूषण नियंत्रण बोर्ड
C
इसरो - भारतीय अंतरिक्ष अनुसंधान संगठन
✓ Correct
D
एमओईएफसीसी - पर्यावरण, वन और जलवायु परिवर्तन मंत्रालय

Solution

Correct answer: C. ISRO (Indian Space Research Organisation) is responsible for managing satellite remote sensing for environmental studies.

A is incorrect: The FSI does forest surveys but does not manage satellites.

B is incorrect: The CPCB monitors pollution, not satellites.

D is incorrect: The MoEFCC is a ministry, not the satellite-operating agency.

💡 ISRO's remote-sensing satellites support agriculture, forestry, water and disaster management.
Q.No 35 Science & TechnologyHindi
दिसंबर 2024 में आईसीएआर-सेंट्रल इंस्टीट्यूट ऑफ फ्रेशवाटर एक्वाकल्चर (सी.आई.एफ.ए.) द्वारा कौन सा ऐप विकसित किया गया है?
A
मत्स्य मित्र
B
जल संवर्धन
C
रंगीन मछली
✓ Correct
D
एक्वा सुरक्षा

Solution

Correct answer: C. In December 2024, ICAR-CIFA developed the 'Rangeen Machhli' (ornamental fish) app.

A is incorrect: 'Matsya Mitra' is not the app developed here.

B is incorrect: 'Jal Samvardhan' is not the app.

D is incorrect: 'Aqua Suraksha' is not the app.

💡 CIFA (Bhubaneswar) is the Central Institute of Freshwater Aquaculture.
Q.No 24 Science & TechnologyHindi
पृथ्वी और चंद्रमा दोनों पर कौन सा भौतिक गुण समान रहता है?
A
वज़न
B
द्रव्यमान
✓ Correct
C
गुरुत्वीय त्वरण
D
दबाव

Solution

Correct answer: B. Mass remains the same on both the Earth and the Moon, as it is the amount of matter in an object.

A is incorrect: Weight changes (it is less on the Moon).

C is incorrect: Gravitational acceleration is different on the Moon.

D is incorrect: Pressure can differ depending on conditions.

💡 Weight = mass x gravity; gravity on the Moon is about one-sixth of Earth's.
Q.No 26 Science & TechnologyHindi
जब पृथ्वी, सूर्य के प्रकाश को चंद्रमा तक पहुंचने से रोकती है, तब चंद्र ग्रहण होता है। यदि पृथ्वी अपने वर्तमान आकार से दोगुनी होती, तो चंद्र ग्रहण में क्या बदलाव होता?
A
ग्रहण अधिक समय तक रहेगा
✓ Correct
B
ग्रहण छोटा हो जाएगा
C
ग्रहण की अवधि में कोई परिवर्तन नहीं होगा
D
ग्रहण की आवृत्ति कम हो जाएगी

Solution

Correct answer: A. If the Earth were twice its size, its larger shadow would make a lunar eclipse last longer.

B is incorrect: The eclipse would not become shorter with a larger shadow.

C is incorrect: There would be a change, not 'no change'.

D is incorrect: The duration, not just the frequency, is what is mainly affected.

💡 A lunar eclipse occurs when the Earth's shadow falls on the Moon.
Q.No 29 Science & TechnologyHindi
कौन-सा हार्मोन पादप वृद्धि को रोकता है और जो पत्तियों के मुरझाने का कारण बन सकता है?
A
साइटोकाइनिन
B
जिबरेलिन
C
एब्सिसिक अम्ल
✓ Correct
D
ऑक्सिन

Solution

Correct answer: C. Abscisic acid is the plant hormone that inhibits growth and can cause wilting (it also promotes dormancy and stomatal closure).

A is incorrect: Cytokinin promotes cell division.

B is incorrect: Gibberellin promotes stem elongation.

D is incorrect: Auxin promotes growth (cell elongation).

💡 Abscisic acid is often called the 'stress hormone' of plants.
Q.No 22 Science & TechnologyHindi
हवा में एक पत्थर की तुलना में किस कारक के कारण एक कागज की शीट अधिक धीरे-धीरे गिरती है?
A
ट्रव्यमान अंतर
B
वायु प्रतिरोध
✓ Correct
C
आकार में अंतर
D
गुरुत्वाकर्षण अंतर

Solution

Correct answer: B. A sheet of paper falls more slowly than a stone in air mainly because of air resistance acting on its larger surface area.

A is incorrect: In a vacuum both would fall together, so mass difference is not the cause.

C is incorrect: Shape matters only because it affects air resistance.

D is incorrect: Gravity acts equally; the difference is due to air resistance.

💡 In a vacuum, a feather and a coin fall at the same rate.
Q.No 23 Science & TechnologyHindi
किसी निश्चित ऊंचाई से मुक्त गिरावट की शुरुआत में, किसी वस्तु की स्थितिज ऊर्जा और गतिज ऊर्जा किस प्रकार संबंधित होती हैं?
A
स्थितिज ऊर्जा > 0, गतिज ऊर्जा > 000
B
स्थितिज ऊर्जा > 000, गतिज ऊर्जा > 0
✓ Correct
C
स्थितिज ऊर्जा > 9धा।४९, गतिज ऊर्जा > 0)
D
गतिज और स्थितिज ऊर्जा दोनों > 0

Solution

Correct answer: B. At the start of a free fall from a height, the potential energy is maximum (greater than zero) and the kinetic energy is zero (the object is momentarily at rest).

A is incorrect: KE is zero at the start, not greater than zero.

C is incorrect: This option is garbled but PE is maximum, KE is zero.

D is incorrect: KE is not greater than zero at the very start.

💡 As the object falls, PE converts into KE, conserving total mechanical energy.
Q.No 24 Science & TechnologyHindi
पृथ्वी से हमें चंद्रमा का हमेशा एक ही भाग क्यों दिखाई देता है?
A
चंद्रमा अपनी अक्ष पर घूर्णन नहीं करता है
B
चंद्रमा जितने समय में पृथ्वी के चारों ओर परिक्रमा करता है, वह उतने ही समय में एक बार घूर्णन करता है
✓ Correct
C
पृथ्वी का घूर्णन, चंद्रमा के घूर्णन को निष्प्रभ कर देता है
D
चंद्रमा, सूर्य के साथ ज्वारीय रूप से जुड़ा हुआ है

Solution

Correct answer: B. We always see the same face of the Moon because it rotates on its axis in the same time it takes to revolve around the Earth (tidal locking).

A is incorrect: The Moon does rotate; it is not non-rotating.

C is incorrect: Earth's rotation does not cancel the Moon's rotation.

D is incorrect: The Moon is tidally locked to the Earth, not the Sun.

💡 This synchronous rotation means the 'far side' of the Moon is never visible from Earth.
Q.No 25 Science & TechnologyHindi
इसरो (।580 ) के ॥॥०.0 प्रणाली का उद्देश्य कया है?
A
मौसम पूर्वानुमान
B
पृथ्वी इमेजिंग
C
क्षेत्रीय नेविगेशन
✓ Correct
D
अंतरिक्ष संचार

Solution

Correct answer: C. ISRO's IRNSS (NavIC) system is meant for regional navigation - providing positioning over India and its surrounding region.

A is incorrect: It is not a weather-forecasting system.

B is incorrect: It is not an Earth-imaging system.

D is incorrect: It is not a communication system.

💡 NavIC (Navigation with Indian Constellation) is India's indigenous satellite navigation system.
Q.No 24 Science & TechnologyHindi
सार्वभौमिक गुरुत्वाकर्षण स्थिरांक ८ का मान किसने निर्धारित किया?
A
आइजैक न्यूटन
B
अल्बर्ट आइंस्टीन
C
हेनरी कैवेंडिश
✓ Correct
D
जोहान्स केप्लर

Solution

Correct answer: C. Henry Cavendish experimentally determined the value of the universal gravitational constant G (the 'Cavendish experiment').

A is incorrect: Isaac Newton gave the law of gravitation but did not measure G.

B is incorrect: Albert Einstein gave the theory of general relativity.

D is incorrect: Johannes Kepler gave the laws of planetary motion.

💡 Cavendish's 1798 experiment used a torsion balance to 'weigh the Earth'.
Q.No 28 Science & TechnologyHindi
आवृतबीजी के जननीय भाग कहां स्थित होते हैं?
A
पत्ती
B
जड़
C
फूल
✓ Correct
D
तना

Solution

Correct answer: C. In angiosperms (flowering plants), the reproductive parts are located in the flower.

A is incorrect: The leaf is for photosynthesis.

B is incorrect: The root absorbs water and anchors the plant.

D is incorrect: The stem provides support and transport.

💡 The flower contains the stamen (male) and the carpel/pistil (female) reproductive organs.
Q.No 37 Science & TechnologyEnglish
भारत में अंतरिक्ष आयोग की स्थापना किस वर्ष की गई थी?
A
1961
B
1972
✓ Correct
C
1984
D
1998

Solution

Correct answer: B. The Space Commission (and the Department of Space) was established in India in 1972.

A is incorrect: 1961 is when INCOSPAR was set up.

C is incorrect: 1984 is incorrect.

D is incorrect: 1998 is incorrect.

💡 The Space Commission formulates policy; ISRO executes the space programme.
Q.No 22 Science & TechnologyHindi
इनमे से कौन सा पशु समूह अल्ट्रासाउंड उत्पन्न करता है?
A
डॉल्फ़िन, चमगादड़ और शिंशुमार
✓ Correct
B
व्हेल, हाथी और जिराफ़
C
कुत्ते, बिल्लियाँ और शेर
D
गैंडे, पतंगे और बाघ

Solution

Correct answer: A. Dolphins, bats and porpoises produce ultrasound (sounds above 20,000 Hz) for echolocation.

B is incorrect: Whales, elephants and giraffes are associated more with low-frequency (infrasound) communication.

C is incorrect: Dogs, cats and lions do not chiefly produce ultrasound.

D is incorrect: Rhinos, moths and tigers are not the standard ultrasound producers listed.

💡 Bats and dolphins use echolocation - emitting ultrasound and sensing the echoes - to navigate and hunt.
Q.No 23 Science & TechnologyHindi
जल में आंशिक रूप से डूबी हुई एक पेंसिल, पृष्ठ पर मुड़ी हुई दिखाई देती है। कौन-सी परिघटना इसका वर्णन करती है?
A
परावर्तन
B
अपवर्तन
✓ Correct
C
विवर्तन
D
व्यतिकरण

Solution

Correct answer: B. A pencil partly dipped in water appears bent at the surface because of refraction - light bends as it passes between water and air.

A is incorrect: Reflection is the bouncing back of light, not bending.

C is incorrect: Diffraction is the bending around obstacles/edges.

D is incorrect: Interference is the superposition of waves.

💡 Refraction occurs because light travels at different speeds in water and air.
Q.No 35 Science & TechnologyHindi
संक्षिप्त नाम “एन.सी.एम.आर.डब्ल्यू.एफ.” भारत सरकार के किस केंद्रीय मंत्रालय से संबंधित है?
A
पर्यावरण, वन एवं जलवायु परिवर्तन मंत्रालय
B
पृथ्वी विज्ञान मंत्रालय
✓ Correct
C
सहकारिता मंत्रालय
D
शिक्षा मंत्रालय

Solution

Correct answer: B. The acronym 'NCMRWF' relates to the Ministry of Earth Sciences - it is the National Centre for Medium Range Weather Forecasting.

A is incorrect: It is not under the Ministry of Environment.

C is incorrect: It is not under the Ministry of Cooperation.

D is incorrect: It is not under the Ministry of Education.

💡 NCMRWF provides numerical weather-prediction support for forecasts in India.
Q.No 37 Science & TechnologyHindi
नासा का कौन सा मिशन बृहस्पति के चंद्रमा यूरोपा का अन्वेषण करेगा?
A
यूरोपा ऑर्बिटर
B
यूरोपा क़िपर
✓ Correct
C
गैलीलियो-2
D
जूस

Solution

Correct answer: B. NASA's 'Europa Clipper' mission will explore Jupiter's moon Europa.

A is incorrect: There is no current NASA mission simply named 'Europa Orbiter' for this.

C is incorrect: 'Galileo-2' is not the mission.

D is incorrect: JUICE is the European Space Agency's Jupiter mission, not NASA's Europa mission.

💡 Europa is believed to have a subsurface ocean beneath its icy crust, a target in the search for life.
Q.No 38 Science & TechnologyHindi
को तब भी देखा जा सकता हैं जब प्रकाश की एक महीन किरण एक छोटे छिद्रों के माध्यम से कमरे में प्रवेश करती है।
A
टिन्डल प्रभाव
✓ Correct
B
ब्राउनी गति
C
विवर्तन
D
निक्षेपण

Solution

Correct answer: A. The Tyndall effect can be seen when a fine beam of light enters a room through a small hole and the path of light becomes visible due to scattering by dust particles.

B is incorrect: Brownian motion is the random movement of particles in a fluid.

C is incorrect: Diffraction is the bending of light around edges.

D is incorrect: Deposition is a change of state from gas to solid.

💡 The Tyndall effect is the scattering of light by colloidal particles.
